title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
